headline: Squint Treatment for Children & Adults in Chennai
subheadline: Dr. Rajeswari evaluates and treats eye misalignment at every age -- the earlier it's addressed, the better the outcome.
metaDescription: Squint (strabismus) evaluation and treatment for children and adults in KK Nagar, Chennai. Call or book online.

whyPatientsChoose.title: Care for Both Children and Adults
whyPatientsChoose.description: Whether it's a childhood squint or one that's persisted into adulthood, we evaluate and treat both.

symptoms: One or both eyes turning inward, outward, up, or down
Child tilting or turning their head to see better
A childhood 'lazy eye' never fully treated

processSteps.title: Detailed Evaluation
processSteps.description: Assessing the type and degree of misalignment, and checking for amblyopia.

processSteps.title: Matched Treatment
processSteps.description: Glasses, patching, or vision therapy first where appropriate.

processSteps.title: Surgical Correction
processSteps.description: When needed, precise muscle realignment for function and appearance.
